debug_info.goal:
case h
a : Type
p : a → Bool
sl : Chapter3.SymList a
lhs rhs : List a
ok :
  (lhs.isEmpty = true → rhs.isEmpty = true ∨ rhs.length = 1) ∧
    (rhs.isEmpty = true → lhs.isEmpty = true ∨ lhs.length = 1)
⊢ dropWhile p (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) =
    Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.dropWhileSL a p (Chapter3.SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
revert lhs rhs ok
  refine Nat.strongRecOn (lengthSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)) ?_
  intro n ih lhs rhs ok
  have sl' : SymList a := ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩
  have hn : lengthSL sl' = n := by
    simp [sl', SymList.lengthSL]
  subst hn
  unfold dropWhileSL
  by_cases hempty : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
  · have hl : lhs = [] := by simpa [List.isEmpty_iff] using hempty.1
    have hr : rhs = [] := by simpa [List.isEmpty_iff] using hempty.2
    subst hl; subst hr
    simp [fromSL, SymList.nil]
  · have hhead : headSL sl' = List.head? (fromSL sl') := by
      simpa using (congrArg (fun f => f sl') (by
        simpa using (show List.head? ∘ fromSL = @headSL a from
          (by
            funext sl
            have ⟨lhs, rhs, ok⟩ := sl
            simp [Function.comp, headSL, fromSL]
            split <;> (
              rename_i h
              simp at h
              have ⟨ha, hb⟩ := h
              subst ha hb
              simp
            )
            simp at ok
            simp [ok))))
    cases hhs : headSL sl' with
    | none =>
      have : sl' = nil := by
        have := (headSL_none_iff_nilSL (sl := sl')).1 (by simpa [hhs])
        exact this
      subst this
      simp [fromSL, SymList.nil]
    | some hsl =>
      simp [hhs, fromSL]
      have hfrom : fromSL sl' = lhs ++ rhs.reverse := by rfl
      have hne : ¬ isEmpty sl' := by
        intro h0
        have := sl_empty_l_empty (sl := sl') h0
        have : (fromSL sl').isEmpty = true := by simpa [List.isEmpty_iff] using this
        simp [hfrom] at this
        cases lhs <;> cases rhs <;> simp at hhs
      by_cases hp : p hsl
      · simp [hp]
        have hlen : lengthSL (tailSL sl') < lengthSL sl' := by
          have hnil : sl' ≠ nil := by
            intro hnil
            subst hnil
            simp [SymList.isEmpty, SymList.nil] at hne
          exact length_tail_lt_length sl' hnil
        have := ih (lengthSL (tailSL sl')) hlen (tailSL sl').lhs (tailSL sl').rhs (tailSL sl').ok
        have htail : fromSL (tailSL sl') = List.tail (fromSL sl') := by
          simpa using (show fromSL (tailSL sl') = tail (fromSL sl') from

              intro sl
              have ⟨xs, ys, ok⟩ := sl
              cases xs with
              | nil =>
                induction ys with
                | nil => simp [tailSL, fromSL, nil]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  simp [fromSL, tailSL, nil]
                  simp at *
                  rw [ok]
                  rw [List.reverse_nil, List.nil_append, List.tail]
              | cons a as =>
                induction ys with
                | nil =>
                  by_cases h : as = [] <;> simp [h, fromSL, tailSL, splitInTwoSL]
                | cons b bs ih =>
                  by_cases h: as = []
                  . simp [h, List.tail, fromSL] at ih
                    simp [h, fromSL, tailSL]
                    simp [splitInTwoSL]
                  . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL])) sl'
        have hhead' : hsl = (fromSL sl').head (by
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            cases rhs with
            | nil => cases hempty (by simp)
            | cons y ys =>
              simp [headSL, fromSL] at hhs
              subst hhs
              simp
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL, fromSL] at hhs
            subst hhs
            simp) := by
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            cases rhs with
            | nil => cases hempty (by simp)
            | cons y ys =>
              simp [headSL, fromSL] at hhs
              subst hhs
              simp
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [headSL, fromSL] at hhs
            subst hhs
            simp
        have : dropWhile p (fromSL sl') = dropWhile p (List.tail (fromSL sl')) := by
          cases lhs with
          | nil =>
            cases rhs with
            | nil => cases hempty (by simp)
            | cons y ys =>
              simp [fromSL, headSL] at hhs
              subst hhs
              simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hp]
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [fromSL, headSL] at hhs
            subst hhs
            simp [Chapter1.dropWhile, hp]
        simp [this, htail] at this
        simpa [sl', dropWhileSL, hempty, hhs, hp, htail] using congrArg fromSL (by
          have := this
          exact (by
            have := ih (lengthSL (tailSL sl')) hlen (tailSL sl').lhs (tailSL sl').rhs (tailSL sl').ok
            simpa [Function.comp, sl', htail] using this))
      · simp [hp]
        cases lhs with

          cases rhs with
          | nil => cases hempty (by simp)
          | cons y ys =>
            simp [headSL, fromSL] at hhs
            subst hhs
